steps.title: Identify the structure
steps.content: This is a list with internal commas: items "intricate patterns... which often held symbolic significance," "depictions of birds, horses, and other animals," and "inlaid enamel accents." Because the second item already contains commas, the items must be separated by semicolons.

steps.title: Apply the rule
steps.content:
Looking at the existing punctuation, "birds, horses, and other animals; and inlaid enamel accents" already uses a semicolon — confirming this is a semicolon-separated list. So the blank also needs a semicolon: "significance; depictions...".

That matches choice C — C is correct.
